problem id: 117b4e53
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  10100111 -> 10000010
  01010011 -> 10000001
  01011111 -> 10000101
  10110101 -> 10001010
  10110000 -> 00001000
  11100000 -> 00000000
  00000101 -> 10000000
  10101010 -> 00000000
  01100111 -> 10000010

query: 00110000
predicted answer: 00000000
